title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.778 - Stars and Stripes Highway designated for a portion of State Highway 25 in Stoddard County
text:
227.778.  Stars and Stripes Highway designated for a portion of State Highway 25 in Stoddard County. — The portion of State Highway 25 from U.S. Highway 60 continuing north to Mary Street in Stoddard County shall be designated as "Stars and Stripes Highway".  The department of transportation shall erect and maintain appropriate signs designating such highway, with the costs to be paid by private donations.
(L. 2021 S.B. 520)
